title: Copper Vastu Rod
shortDescription: Premium copper vastu rod for energy balancing and vastu defect correction.
description: The Copper Vastu Rod is specially designed to improve positive energy circulation and neutralize vastu defects in homes, offices, and commercial spaces. Crafted from premium quality copper, this rod helps balance disturbed zones and supports harmonious energy flow. Ideal for concealed installations in walls, flooring, and directional correction areas.
benefits: Suitable for residential and commercial spaces

title: Iron Vastu Rod
shortDescription: Durable iron vastu rod designed for grounding energies and directional balance.
description: The Iron Vastu Rod is crafted for vastu remedies related to grounding unstable energies and correcting directional imbalances. Iron symbolizes strength and stability, making this rod effective for reducing negative vibrations and supporting balanced energy flow in residential and commercial environments.

title: Stainless Steel Vastu Rod
shortDescription: Premium stainless steel vastu rod for long-lasting energy correction and stability.
description: The Stainless Steel Vastu Rod is designed for modern vastu applications requiring durability, stability, and balanced energy correction. Crafted from premium stainless steel, this rod resists corrosion while helping harmonize disturbed spaces and improve energetic balance.

title: Brass Vastu Rod
shortDescription: Elegant brass vastu rod for positivity, harmony, and spiritual energy balancing.
description: The Brass Vastu Rod combines vastu correction benefits with spiritual energy enhancement. Brass is associated with prosperity, purification, and positivity, helping improve harmonious energy circulation while reducing negative vibrations in homes, offices, and meditation spaces.
benefits: Ideal for sacred and meditation spaces

title: Aluminium Vastu Rod
shortDescription: Lightweight aluminium vastu rod for affordable and effective energy balancing.
description: The Aluminium Vastu Rod is a practical vastu correction solution designed for lightweight and efficient energy balancing. Its corrosion-resistant construction and durable finish make it suitable for modern homes and offices requiring affordable vastu remedies.
